modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to delete unwanted custom tab from MyU Portal.

full_description_text: User has two "My Tabs" on their MyU Portal page. They accidentally added these tabs by clicking the ‘plus’ and now want to delete one. There’s nothing under these tabs, and they just want one removed.
short_description: Unable to delete unwanted custom tab from MyU Portal.
description: User has two "My Tabs" on their MyU Portal page. They accidentally added these tabs by clicking the ‘plus’ and now want to delete one. There’s nothing under these tabs, and they just want one removed.
